Oracle Events
- Search Airtable "Client Accounts" table for records where Account Manager is "Catalina Dubois" (or similar). Returns 4 accounts: Canopy Health, NorthWind Technologies, PivotPoint Labs, Prairie Data Consulting.
- Search inbox/sent for threads related to each of the 4 accounts, plus DOT compliance, ExpenseBot, Terraform, Heartland.
- Search conversations for discussions about Catalina's accounts, DOT policy, expense tool issues, Terraform incident, and David escalations.
- Look up invoices and customer balances for Canopy Health, NorthWind, PivotPoint, Prairie Data.
- Look up deals and account status for each of Catalina's 4 accounts.
- Check existing tickets assigned to Catalina or related to her accounts to identify gaps.
- Send email (via send_email) to catalina.dubois@moveops.com, CC david.chen@moveops.com, with full findings organized by account.
- Patricia Langford's approval needed for $2,650 in surcharges on INV-2026-0401.
- INV-2026-0412 has 3 unresolved finance flags, including $7,350/move vs $12K/move pricing gap.
- No existing ticket for immigration attorney coordination - critical compliance gap.
- No existing ticket for 600-lb CNC mill custom crating and climate freight.
- Figma license $144 pending - requires manual verification per new >$100 policy.
